name: RBL Maxima Plus Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹1,50,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 4X Reward Points on dining and entertainment spends
2 Reward Points per ₹100 on all other purchases

additionalBenefits: Complimentary movie tickets (Buy 1 Get 1) on BookMyShow
Fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations
pros: Good accelerated rewards on dining and entertainment
Decent domestic lounge access for a mid-tier card
Reasonable annual fee that's easily waivable
cons: Limited redemption options compared to larger banks
idealFor: Movie and dining enthusiasts looking for targeted rewards
Users who want a mid-tier card with decent lifestyle benefits

faqs.question: How does the BookMyShow offer work?
faqs.answer: You get Buy 1 Get 1 free movie tickets on BookMyShow, typically limited to 1 transaction per month. Terms may vary - check the RBL rewards portal for current details.

faqs.question: Is RBL a safe bank for credit cards?
faqs.answer: Yes, RBL Bank is a scheduled commercial bank regulated by RBI. Their credit cards come with standard security features and fraud protection.

faqs.question: Is the annual fee waivable?
faqs.answer: Yes, the ₹750 annual fee is waived on spending ₹1,50,000 or more in the previous year.
